summary.shape_sentence: Bullish RTH with a morning rally, sharp midday flush, afternoon vertical reclaim, and late fade into a positive close.

goat.note: Vertical upside squeeze from roughly 25,500 into the HOD near 25,860.

red_circles.behavior: Best bearish behavior appeared at the late-morning rollover and post-HOD lower-high fade; afternoon shorts were vulnerable to squeeze risk.

green_circles.behavior: Best bullish behavior appeared after the 12:15 demand hold and on the 14:25-14:30 breakout base.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Morning supply around 25,670-25,700 was respected first, then broken decisively during the afternoon squeeze.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25,360-25,420 held the midday flush and anchored the afternoon reversal.

time_markers.10am_blue: Bullish expansion above early chop, building toward the morning high.
time_markers.12pm_red: Aggressive downside flush nearing the session low.
time_markers.2pm_green: Base-building above the midday low before the upside breakout.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Positive close off the HOD after a late fade, still well above the open.

tags.banks_broken: morning supply near 25,670-25,700 broken on afternoon squeeze

takeaway: Bullish reversal/reclaim day: early strength failed into a midday flush, but demand held and powered a 14:30 upside squeeze through morning supply before a late fade.
